title: Volodymyr Shcherbyna
text: Home * People * Volodymyr Shcherbyna Volodymyr Shcherbyna , an Ukrainian software developer and computer chess programmer. He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Igel [1] , which recently features its own NNUE implementation [2] .
